report: Google Chat Supervised Reply Console — implementation evidence
verdict: RELIABILITY PROGRAMME BUILT (Phases 0-10) — dual-path inbound + notification state machine + watchdog + prospect/sender name enrichment + telemetry, all deployed and tested (101 tests). System PARTIAL / NOT PRODUCTION-ACCEPTED: global send gate OFF; 99.99% is a TARGET not demonstrated (sample < 10,000); production-enable requires a separate explicit owner decision after controlled acceptance.

B_inactive_n8n_duplicate.name: BACKUP — HMZ — Instantly Reply → Google Chat Notification — PRE-INTERACTIVE — 2026-07-18

storage_strategy.internal_url: http://hmz-reply-console:5691 (no host port, not via Traefik)

google_oidc_verification.helper: reply-console sidecar; least-privilege; audience fixed via compose env; tokens never logged; /health; 401 on failure with no state change

allowed_user_binding.authorises_on: stable Event.user.name (HUMAN only); allowed email = bootstrap evidence, normalised trim+lowercase

authentication.wrong_audience_401: enforced by verifyIdToken aud check — full proof at gate
authentication.unauthorized_user_blocked: enforced in Parse & Authorize — full proof at gate

controlled_send.context_id: 07b1ec10*** (fresh; failed 401 attempts preserved on a different context, never reused)

rollback.notification_workflow: PUT backups/n8n/...pre-interactive-2026-07-18.json back to JojqjTVw3KQRtYEN, or import/activate duplicate xxOjHdtQFgEcXHMI
rollback.sidecar: docker compose stop hmz-reply-console; restore compose/.env from .before-reply-console-20260718T163257Z

v2_delivery_and_authz_diagnosis.v1_project_symptom: Google logged immediate errors (code 13 INTERNAL / code 3 'didn't respond or invalid'); multi-layer proof (proven-working tcpdump on :443, n8n executions, sidecar logs) showed the request never reached the VPS. Endpoint healthy (valid TLS, reachable, valid Chat responses). Root cause was Google-side app dispatch config (resolved by owner creating a clean standalone V2 app).
v2_delivery_and_authz_diagnosis.v2_verification: verified:true, mode=endpoint_url, chat@system.gserviceaccount.com, aud=exact endpoint URL, iss=accounts.google.com
v2_delivery_and_authz_diagnosis.authz_bug_root_cause: n8n container lacked GOOGLE_CHAT_ALLOWED_EMAIL in its environment, so $env.GOOGLE_CHAT_ALLOWED_EMAIL was empty and every owner-email comparison failed -> 'restricted' denial. Token SA email was never compared to owner email.
v2_delivery_and_authz_diagnosis.fix: Owner authorisation moved into the isolated sidecar (durable binding + bootstrap capture), OWNER_ALLOWED_EMAIL wired into the sidecar only (no n8n recreate). Interaction workflow Verify node forwards sanitised event identity; Parse uses the sidecar's binding/bootstrap decision.
v2_delivery_and_authz_diagnosis.dual_mode_verifier: retained; endpoint-URL ID token (V2, aud=endpoint URL) and project-number Chat-SA JWT both independently strict; arbitrary audiences rejected.

http_401_root_cause.cause: Authorization header was not a valid Bearer: first via missing $env.INSTANTLY_API_KEY in n8n; then an n8n-API-imported httpHeaderAuth credential that did not execute. Key permission was never the issue (all 3 workspace keys are all:all).
http_401_root_cause.repair: Moved the Instantly send into the isolated sidecar (performSend), which forms 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' itself from a root-owned INSTANTLY_API_KEY env; fingerprint eb31b16145df matches intended; live read-only auth probe returned HTTP 200.
http_401_root_cause.failed_attempt_handling: FAILED_AUTH_401 recorded immutably in context.sendAttempts[]; context -> RETRYABLE; a retry requires a FRESH draft + fresh one-use token; the failed context is never silently reset to PENDING.

whitespace_collapse_root_cause.symptom: multiline reply collapsed to one line in Review card + Edit dialog
whitespace_collapse_root_cause.cause: extraction used .replace(/@[^\s]+/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim() which collapsed all internal whitespace
whitespace_collapse_root_cause.repair:
extraction now normalises CRLF/CR->LF, strips only the mention token, trims OUTER boundary only; card renders each \n as
; email body.text is byte-for-byte, body.html via toHtml(); proven by 13/13 formatting tests + server-side raw-event check (blank-line nuances are Google's own delivery, preserved faithfully).

send_architecture: Single atomic sidecar POST /v1/context/:id/send — validate(side-effect-free) -> scoped go-live gate -> atomic APPROVED->SENDING lock -> ONE Instantly POST (Bearer formed once) -> classify SENT/FAILED_AUTH_401/FAILED_SAFE/SEND_UNCERTAIN -> finalize. Duplicate clicks and stale tokens blocked before any POST.

tests.inbound_fault_coverage: webhook normal; webhook-missing->readback recovers; webhook-after-readback dedup; duplicate webhook; non-received ignored; auto-reply/bounce skipped; list-error safe; high-water-mark advance; name has first-only/last-only/none/ambiguous; account both/absent/missing/inactive.
tests.send_fault_coverage: one POST under 2xx/timeout/reset/parse/5xx/response-loss; email_sent-first; readback-later; duplicate click; multiple candidates; no candidate; 429/5xx readback; restart durability.

credential_storage: sidecar env INSTANTLY_API_KEY from root-owned .env (chmod 600) on VPS; fingerprint eb31b16145df (len 68); never in repo/Git/workflow JSON/logs; key value confirmed absent from repo.
production_readiness: PARTIAL / NOT PRODUCTION-ACCEPTED. Global send gate OFF. 99.99% is a target, not statistically demonstrated (sample < 10,000). Remaining: live controlled acceptance (webhook-path + poll-recovery + name-correctness on owner-controlled fixtures), then a SEPARATE explicit owner production-enable decision.

false_send_uncertain_incident.root_cause: AbortSignal.timeout(15000) fired; Instantly response exceeded 15s; client aborted (TimeoutError) AFTER Instantly accepted+sent; response lost -> http_0 -> false SEND_UNCERTAIN.
false_send_uncertain_incident.readback_confirmation: thread 53-DdSVxV0***, sent email 019f782d*** @02:21:08 (attempt started 02:21:01); exactly one POST.

reconciliation_system.state_machine: SENDING -> {SENT_API_CONFIRMED | FAILED_DEFINITIVE(->RETRYABLE) | RECONCILING}; RECONCILING -> {SENT_RECONCILED_WEBHOOK | SENT_RECONCILED_READBACK | MANUAL_RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED}; RECONCILING holds lock, NEVER re-POSTs.
reconciliation_system.authoritative_thread: stored on context; reconciliation requires thread_id == stored authoritative thread; card params never trusted.
reconciliation_system.readback: GET /emails thread+account+sent+timestamp filter; candidate requires thread+sent+account+recipient+normalised-subject+timestamp-window+exact body hash (text or html-derived). one->READBACK; many->MANUAL; none->stay.
reconciliation_system.email_sent: isolated subscription 019f7b2f*** (active; reuses existing secret; reply_received UNCHANGED) -> workflow 0QqQh78lrgOmvByZ (no send/notify) -> sidecar; matches only open RECONCILING; dup/unrelated ignored.
reconciliation_system.rate_limiter: shared 20/min token bucket; sync readback in Chat window + 30s durable background sweep (survives restart); MANUAL after 6-min window.
reconciliation_system.ux: Sent / Sent-confirmed-in-Instantly / 'Confirming delivery' + Check-status (no 2nd Send) / 'could not confirm, do not resend'.

reconciliation_body_matching_fix.problem: Instantly wraps the sent html in a full document (<!DOCTYPE html>…<title>…</title>…<body>…</body>) with no text field; exact body-hash match never matched -> stuck RECONCILING -> MANUAL (false).
reconciliation_body_matching_fix.fix: structural equivalence: htmlToText strips head/title/style/script/tags; normalizeForMatch collapses whitespace; match requires the reviewed body text to be present in the sent body, plus thread+account+recipient+subject+timestamp. exact-hash fast path retained.
reconciliation_body_matching_fix.proven: live readback matched the real stuck send (email 019f7b47) and the re-test send (019f7b94); wrapped-html unit test passes.

auto_notify.requirement: owner must be informed automatically, without clicking Check status.
auto_notify.implementation: sidecar posts a threaded status message via the one-way incoming webhook (no app auth). Async paths only (email_sent webhook + 30s background sweep) fire notify; the synchronous Send/Check-status card shows the result itself, so no duplicate.
auto_notify.double_message_bug: observed once (sync card + sync-reconcile notify both posted); fixed by removing notify from the synchronous reconcile paths; async paths only act while RECONCILING so at most one async post.

reliability_contract.inbound_notification_slo: 99.99% of applicable prospect replies reach CHAT_NOTIFIED (99% <2min, 99.9% <5min). No reply may silently disappear.
reliability_contract.supervised_send_outcome_slo: >=99.99% of POST attempts reach a clear success (SENT_API_CONFIRMED/RECONCILED_WEBHOOK/RECONCILED_READBACK) or FAILED_DEFINITIVE without manual investigation; MANUAL_RECONCILIATION_REQUIRED <=0.01%; no auto second POST.
reliability_contract.distinction: Console proves Instantly acceptance + thread presence; it does NOT guarantee external mailbox inbox delivery.

dual_path_inbound.recovery_path: HMZ — Inbound Recovery Poll (7LNeDYVaEbuZ4fpO, active, every 1 min) -> sidecar /v1/poll-recover: lists recent Instantly received emails with a rolling high-water-mark + overlap, dedups by Instantly email id (primary key), recovers+notifies any missing genuine reply tagged DISCOVERED_READBACK. Auto-replies/bounces skipped. First live run: scanned 1, recovered 0, alreadyPresent 1 (correct dedup, no flood).
dual_path_inbound.dedup: exactly one context + one normal notification per reply; webhook and poll race safely on the Instantly email id.

notification_state_machine: DISCOVERED_WEBHOOK|DISCOVERED_READBACK -> (post) -> CHAT_NOTIFIED | CHAT_POST_AMBIGUOUS | CHAT_POST_FAILED_DEFINITIVE. 2xx+message-name => CHAT_NOTIFIED; 2xx without name => ambiguous (never silently 'notified'). Honest limitation: incoming-webhook architecture cannot read Chat message history, so a response lost after Google accepted the post can create a rare unavoidable delivery ambiguity — documented, not hidden.

watchdog.workflow: HMZ — Reliability Watchdog (5nSbIHky9dQaJvd9, active, every 5 min) -> sidecar /v1/watchdog.
watchdog.checks: unresolved notifications (CHAT_NOTIFIED not reached), stalled/never-run poll (heartbeat age), Instantly API 401/429/5xx health.
watchdog.alerting: sanitised alert (severity/count/oldest/component/action; no bodies, no credentials, no raw IDs) posted to an ops thread via the incoming webhook AND persisted+queryable at /v1/watchdog. LIMITATION: alert transport reuses the incoming webhook (no separate channel exists); documented.

name_enrichment.prospect: strict order: reply_received merged First_name/Last_name (WEBHOOK); else exact lead lookup by email+campaign (EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_LOOKUP); multiple matches => AMBIGUOUS (no arbitrary pick); never inferred from local part/display/company/body/signature. Unicode-safe, diacritics/case preserved. Fallback display 'Name unavailable <email>'.
name_enrichment.sender: Instantly Account for the exact eaccount (first_name/last_name), durable cache (6h TTL, refresh on miss/stale, status), fails CLOSED for sending eligibility but never suppresses the inbound notification. Fallback 'Sender name not configured <mailbox>'. Never operator/local-part name.
name_enrichment.surfaced_in: notification + review card (From (sender)/To (prospect)) + edit review + success receipt (Prospect/Sender/Subject/Confirmation/Time London+UTC).
name_enrichment.verified: live sender-name for a real connected account returned found+eligible+resolved name; notification dry-run shows both named lines.

telemetry.module: append-only per-UTC-day JSONL (concurrency-safe; no bodies/names/emails/credentials). /v1/report gives numerator/denominator/percentage/sample + latency p50/p95/p99/max for inbound + outbound + data-quality.
telemetry.truthfulness: never prints '99.99% achieved' below 10,000 applicable events; below that reports '0 unresolved out of N'. Current counters start at this deployment (prior traffic pre-dates telemetry) so N is small and 99.99% is a TARGET only.

inactive_n8n_duplicates: email-sent AcZzig5JJkKcIVEt (all inactive, structural hashes matched)
